programme.title: The Hummingbird Project

programme.title: London Heist

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: Former high school cheerleading captain Rose (Amy Adams) is a thirty-something single mother who cleans houses for a living. Wanting to send her trouble-making son Oscar to a private school, Rose decides to take her married lover's (Steve Zahn) advice.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Bogus

programme.title: The Lair Of The White Worm

programme.title: Amityville II: The Possession

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: Two young people are entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Wrangler: Wrangler

programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Bite The Bullet

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Hammer of the Gods

programme.title: The Master

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb

programme.title: JFK

programme.title: Copycat

programme.title: Mortal Fear

programme.title: Velocity Trap

programme.title: Project Ithaca
programme.desc: A group of strangers awaken aboard an alien spacecraft, which is harnessing their terror to power the ship. Divided they will die. Together, they can find a way home.

programme.title: Robot Riot
programme.desc: A group of soldiers are dropped into an abandoned town with no memory of who or where they are only to discover that they are being used as "test subjects" for a new group of giant "battle robots" being controlled by an insane army general.

programme.title: Mail Order Monster
programme.desc: A girl seeks help and guidance from a robot monster to cope with the bullies at school and her father's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn’t speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.desc: A report on the unsolved abduction and murder of 16-year-old Molly Bish. Bish disappeared in June 2000 from the local swimming hole. In May 2003, Tim McGuigan, a former police officer, helped discover evidence that lead to the discovery of Molly’s body.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Ride
programme.desc: Jane Mixer, a student at the University of Michigan Law School in March of 1969, had just agreed to get married and had arranged a ride home to tell her parents. Her body was found in a small, rural cemetery just miles from her dorm.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: In her divorce case, Frieda Hanimov feared that she would lose custody of her children because she suspected that the judge ruling on her case was corrupt. She went to authorities with her suspicions, Hanimov agreed to go undercover and, wearing a wire.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder They Wrote: The End of the Dream
programme.desc: A report on the charismatic Scott Scurlock, known as “Hollywood” because of his flamboyant style and effective use of disguises in the commission of crimes, successfully eluded capture for four years while effortlessly robbing 18 banks.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chasing the Barefoot Bandit
programme.desc: A report on Colton Harris-Moore, also known as the “Barefoot Bandit,” because of his habit of committing crimes barefoot and leaving chalk outlines of his feet; and whose exploits included stealing planes, guns, yachts, and escaping to foreign countries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preacher's Passion
programme.desc: A preacher searches for answers about his girlfriend's death.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels

programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In WWII's final days, Nazis hid evidence of their crimes. SS officers transported boxes to Austria's remote Lake Toplitz, witnessed dumping them on May 1, 1945. Rumors. Rumors claimed the boxes held stolen gold, part of a $500M Nazi heist.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1897, two brothers began a 50-year quest to find a treasure buried 70 years earlier in the Virginia Blue Mountains, documented in a secret code. They sought help from America's top code-breakers to unravel Thomas Beale’s treasure mystery.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: According to legend, King Arthur was Britain’s greatest king. He led his Knights of the Round Table from Camelot, a spectacular castle, and fought Anglo-Saxon invaders, uniting the country. Leslie Alcock led a team to find Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: This is the amazing story of how a two amateur explorers discovered one of the world's greatest civilisations, the Maya.

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Amelia Dyer was perhaps the most prolific killer in British history. She earned a living through murder. And her victims were babies.

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.desc: Victorian double killer, the murderer of a young mother and baby - a woman named Mary Pearcey

programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering a fifth of the earth's surface, the Arctic tundra is one of the coldest places on the planet. The piercing temperatures and powerful winds challenge even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Coast of the Whalesharks
programme.desc: On the remote coastline of Australia’s northwest, there are great natural wonders to be found. Above the sea on this sunbaked coast, there is very little; only a sparse landscape shaped by the arid conditions. But here, the miracle reveals itself…

programme.title: Wildest India: Ganges: River of Life
programme.desc: Then watch, the longest river in India, The Ganges. It's a lifeline to wild animals, from rhinoceros and river dolphins to otters and gharials.

programme.title: Wildest India: Thar Desert: Sacred Sands
programme.desc: Covering 200,000 km sq, India's Thar desert is one of the harshest places on Earth. Desiccating winds and near permanent drought has earned this unforgiving land another name: the region of death.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Sweat, Hot Lakebottom Summer / The S'Mogre
programme.desc: A heat wave forces McGee to sneak a dab of Sawyer's anti-sweat cream. After trying to cheer up Armand, McGee creates a s'more so big, it topples and coats him in delicious goo.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Hiccups / Boogeyman Fever
programme.desc: Things start disappearing around Lakebottom!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Valley of the Iguanasquat / Legend of Wiggly's Gold
programme.desc: When the campers discover a prehistoric valley near Stinky Pits they also find a cursed gem.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pirate of Ickygloomy / Attack of the 50-Foot Squirt
programme.desc: While playing Pirates on a shipwreck the Bottom Dwellers must battle the ghost Spitbeard the Pirate.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: The Day Squirt Stood Still / Anti Gravity
programme.desc: The campers track down a UFO inhabited by an alien from the planet Squipiter.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Schwampbillies / Remember Fort Sunny Bottom
programme.desc: When McGee, Gretchen and Squirt find themselves lost deep in the schwamp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee.T / The Great Tiki Hunt
programme.desc: McGee befriends a frog-like alien creature that crash lands close by Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee the Mermaid / Welcome to Buttcon
programme.desc: The kids accidentally resurrect an evil mermaid who floods the camp.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life
programme.desc: While lost in the woods, McGee, Gretchen, Squirt and Sawyer discover a creepy cabin.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Borgata Poker Open

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Festa al Lago

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 1
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Destiny's Will, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Shadows of Doubt, Part 2
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 1
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Truth and Consequences, Part 2
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 2
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Signs of Doom, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A New Threat: Part I

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Thinks Big/Arthur Cleans Up
programme.desc: Once again, Arthur gets to do everything. Mostly he gets to carry the ring in Aunt Lucy's wedding. Elwood City's park is in sad shape, and after grumbling about it, the kids find themselves volunteered to clean it up.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Deer Friend/Buster Hits the Books
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur
programme.desc: An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare
programme.desc: Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Arthur: Get Smart/Baby Steps
programme.desc: Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur's First Day
programme.desc: It's finally the first day of fourth grade and Arthur couldn't be more excited - until he learns Buster is in another class! Meanwhile, D.W. is nervous for her first day of kindergarten. Will Arthur and D.W. be able to make new friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Blizzard/The Rat Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: A blizzard comes to town, taking out the electricity and sending residents scrambling for supplies. Can neighbors find ways to help each other survive through the storm? Then, the unthinkable is happening...Arthur's teacher is moving in!

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend

programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl draw a picture on a paving slab using chalks. A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and rains and rains and makes a big beautiful rainbow.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor asks Bob to build a Pets Corner in the local park. Farmer Pickles has picked up a selection of animals for it – including a chinchilla – and sends Travis and Spud off to deliver them to Bob. Unfortunately Bob runs out of chicken wire.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is installing an antique fireplace for Mrs Percival. He goes to JJ’s yard to collect it and finds JJ playing with his new model aeroplane. Bob then heads to Mrs Percival’s and starts to knock out the old fireplace.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is demolishing an old house, and sends the floorboards and roof tiles for recycling. As he finishes the job, he gets a call from Mr Bentley who wants him to renovate the museum’s annexe, where Mr Ellis plans to exhibit the work of local artists.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has bought a new attachment for Benny to try. It looks a bit big and heavy, but Benny is desperate to try it out so Bob promises he can as long as he’s with him to help. Bob gets an excited phone call from Sandy Beech up at the cave house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a goat run for Farmer Pickles new goat – Giddy. It’s Travis’s job to collect Giddy from Meg MacDonald the goat breeder. Spud teases Travis about being slow and Travis resolves to collect the goat very quickly.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are installing a bull-rush water recycling system to clean water from Farmer Pickles’ cottage. The clean water will be used to water Farmer Pickles new orchard. Bob explains that everything needs to be built in order – it’s a process.

programme.title: Green Builds and Recycling Centres
programme.desc: Bob’s back On Site! Join Bob as he shows you the amazing world of eco homes and recycling centres and learn how things you throw away can be used to make something new.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy and Bob have a very special announcement to make. They are going to fix up an old Houseboat for Wendy to live in. There’s a lot of hard work to be done. They need to make a gang plank, fix solar panels and give it a really good clean.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Beasley’s pipes and boiler are making banging noises and Bob is called in to replace them. Whilst Bob and Wendy are collecting the new Boiler from JJ, Molly explains that she is looking after Mrs Broadbent’s baby rabbits.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s building a ‘drying tunnel’ for drying Annie seaweed. Muck passes Mr Beasley who’s having a spot of bother with his washing. He decides to build Mr Beasley a drying tunnel for his washing.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor decides that the town needs a drive-in cinema and Bob is asked to build it out in the countryside. The first film to be shown will be “The Invasion of the Giant Bug.”

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building the road connecting Bob’s mobile home site with the location of the new yard. It’s a big job for Roley, but just as Bob’s explaining the job, a pretty little bird flies overhead clutching some twigs in her beak.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Whilst Bob and the team build Annie Pickles new seafront house, Muck is worried that Scoop is a better digger than he is and decides to prove himself with a sandcastle competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s renovating a dilapidated old watermill in Sunflower Valley – it’s going to make flour from Farmer Pickles sunflower farm. After checking that it’s safe, Bob realises that one of the millstones has gone missing. How very odd!

programme.desc: When Laura-Ann Beyerly vanishes without a trace, her parents immediately file a missing persons report. Her mother senses that something is wrong.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Murder Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When a swimming instructor, Mae Wentz, is brutally stabbed to death in her Boynton Beach home, Florida police comb the bloody crime scene for clues.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Damage Done
programme.desc: When New Jersey single mother Nicole Arochas vanishes after a night on the town, her parents suspect the worst and file a missing persons report.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: Jim Donnelly was a hard-working family man living a quiet life in suburban Auckland. For 20 years he’d worked as a scientist at the Glenbrook Steel Mill, south of Auckland. On the 21st of June 2004, he simply vanished into thin air.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: In 2006, 19-year-old Blake Stott died in a mysterious car fire. Blake had seemingly pulled into a South Otago lay-by to have a sleep, when his late-model, un-modified car burst into flames.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Get Out of This House
programme.desc: When an aggressive spirit stalks a young family, PRS is called in to investigate. When it is determined that the source of the haunting may have been unknowingly invited in, Ryan races to identify and hopefully defeat the entity before it's too late.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Connection
programme.desc: P.R.S. is called in to help a young mother tormented by an otherworldly connection to a teenage girl murdered in her neighborhood years ago. Could she have psychic ability or is there a more sinister force at work?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette starts the new series with an investigation at the haunted Eden Camp. Strange noises and an unknown force try to separate the team. Can they endure the entire investigation, or will the paranormal activity prove too much for them to handle?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her world-famous team continue investigating Eden Camp. Splitting into lone vigils, they quickly regret it as lost souls, dark shadows, and disembodied voices haunt this living museum, all eager to make their presence known.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit this deserted old mansion which is way past its original splendour. They are soon surrounded by unexplained activity as something is following them and for at least two members of crew, they are pushed to their very limits.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: An all but deserted manor house that boasts murder, death and intrigue among its history becomes the setting for one of the most intriguing investigation to date. The team are showered with object that appear to land in the same way.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and team are put to the test as activity seems to be all around them, something is following them but who or what. Could it be the spirit of a man they connect who died near the house over 100 years ago?

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic

programme.title: A Haunting: Face Of Evil
programme.desc: Joy, a working mother of three, assumes a girl's weekend at a haunted plantation will be a pleasant change of pace. But after she returns, her youngest child's sleep is shattered by the ominous presence of a dark phantom.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell

programme.title: The InBESTigators

programme.title: The InBESTigators

programme.title: The InBESTigators

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Mario gets hungry for justice when his Kakow Koalas, the latest snack sensation sweeping the playground, go missing.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Ava tries to cheer up the lovesick Mr Barker by planning a birthday party, but his birthday cake goes missing during the event.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Convinced a minigolf customer is cheating in order to claim the prize, Charlie hires the Inbestigators to help save his job.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.desc: Birthday boy Toby needs the Inbestigators' help. His birthday invitation to friends has been mysteriously copied and distributed to the entire class.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzy remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble causes Kroomi and Nabi to switch bodies when she accidentally makes a wish upon a star.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Adamant that Bubble's Hotel doesn't make mistakes, Bubble sets out to determine the cause of her guest room mix-up.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble tries to give Princess Daleela the ideal hotel experience by guessing what the Princess wants instead of asking her.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble throws the hotel's temperature out of whack when she tries to create the perfect snow for Picassno, her snow-sculpting guest.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When the tennis sisters, Love and Spin, keep getting the same amount of points during a match, Bubble and Nabi decide to face them in doubles to break the tie.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble helps Doctor Emily find hotel guests who will agree to be her patients - but the one who most needs Doctor Emily's services is sick Bubble herself.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble and Superina need to figure out how to stop a mysterious purple villain who is setting off the Supehero HQ lair's booby traps.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble bubbles up a spin suit so that an injured Tutu can enjoy dancing again, but soon her spinning starts to wreak havoc on the hotel.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble sets out to create the ultimate scavenger hunt to tire out Delphina's hyper seahorse babies - but as she tries to come up with new clues, she becomes more exhausted.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When a guest loses her temper, Bubble must play mediator between her guest, Petal, and the thorns she scared away.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When the hotel gains six newborn baby clouds who leave a trail of weather-related destruction in their wake, Bubble must find a way to contain them.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When Delphina accuses Kroomi of losing her golden conch shell, Bubble sets out to find the true culprit, and in doing so, Delphina learns an important lesson about making assumptions before having all the facts.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: When the Queen of Hearts wants to keep a parrotfish against its will, Bubble must convince the Queen to let go.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel

programme.desc: When John crashes Cab 804, the cabbies are shocked into a period of mourning, as they reminisce about the wild and memorable events that occurred when they were driving the legendary cab.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Thicker Than Water

programme.desc: Rembrandt "Crying Man'' Brown becomes the Feds' No. 1 crimebuster in a world where San Francisco is dominated by rival gangster families.

programme.desc: The Sliders enter a world where society's young people command all the power and respect.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.desc: Mo gets a crush on Dee’s very attractive younger brother when he comes to visit.

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys can't resolve their differences, Holly sends the three of them to couples' therapy, where they discover that Holly is the problem.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly takes Haskell on a practice date, and finds herself blown away by Haskell's hidden talents. Stuart embarrasses Phil when he tries way too hard to fit in with Phil's friends.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly tries to get to the bottom of a big secret between Eden and her boss. Stuart is about to be reunited with his beloved dog – until Phil loses him.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s quest to land a new client puts the boys in a strip club, and Stuart in the hospital. Holly’s new “magic bra” works wonders.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s office crush Paul returns to work, and she is determined to find out how he feels about her once and for all.Stuart, sick of doing all the cleaning himself hires a maid, who quickly turns Haskell’s life upside down.

programme.title: The Exes: The Party
programme.desc: After giving Holly’s new boyfriend Paul a hard time, the guys make amends and Paul invites them to the party of a lifetime. But on the way, Stuart discovers that Paul’s ex-wife might still be in the picture.

programme.title: The Exes: Sister Act
programme.desc: Desperate to impress her perfect sister Jill, Holly invents an alternative lifestyle for herself that quickly spirals out of control. Meanwhile, the guys are riding high on a "special" dish cooked up by Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil's client, tennis star Chuck Feeney, stays with the guys to hide from the paparazzi. But Chuck the ladies' man turns out to be more of a man's man. Haskell and Holly compete over who can take better care of pregnant Eden.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files
programme.desc: Fake celebrity clairvoyant Williams preyed on the elderly by performing fake readings, including one where he directed his client to a forged will.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Stephen Klenczar – Bogus Barrister
programme.desc: Obsessed with boys toys, he posed as a barrister and claimed he worked for the British Government secret service.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman
programme.desc: Golightly conned tens of thousands of dollars from men she found in lonely hearts columns and dating sites.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus
programme.desc: The bizarre murder of a world-renowned anthropologist over the Christmas holidays shocks staff and students at the university where she teaches.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Saint
programme.desc: A frat boy lures a girl to his house with the promise of a party, but once there it turns out he has ulterior motives. When the girl says no, he violently attacks her. A string of violence is finally uncovered, revealing a sinister trail of violence.

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson
programme.desc: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are ambushed in Russia. Two weeks later, Sydney wakes up in the house of a man called Tsarlov, who claims to have saved her.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney gets kidnapped, but by whom? Nigel, Claudia and Cate will have to go through the list of enemies Sydney has made in the past and deduce which of them is responsible. Cue flashbacks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydney's friend phones to inform her that he's discovered information on the Golden Hawk of Maribor, lost since 1711. Sydney and Nigel travel to Lubjanka to meet him, but he's already gone.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Ore Oduba and Kerry Howard join Dara to play a series of games as part of a five-round gaming challenge. Along the way, they battle it out on `Tony Hawk's Skateboarding', `Tomb Raider' and `X-Men vs Street Fighter'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Josh Widdicombe and Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock aim to unearth the next Tonton Zola Moukoko as they play Football Manager - and four other titles - on the witty video game show.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Matt Forde hopes to remain 'Unspun' as he and Jessica Knappett race each other on Need for Speed. Other classic titles on Dara's consoles-and-comedy show include The Sims.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: DJ Dev and comic Susan Calman do battle on five titles, including Minecraft and Batman - Arkham Asylum.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 66

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 60

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 145

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 197
programme.desc: Can you jump to safety from a collapsing rope bridge as seen in the film "Cliffhanger"? Can a strong enough hailstorm sink a boat?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: We Can't Live Like This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Violated Me!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team with the most properly cooked eggs wins a helicopter tour of Los Angeles; when a chef gets into an argument with Ramsay, it threatens a team.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cheerleaders and members of the marching band from the University of Southern California have their lunch prepared by the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Thrill Kill: The Janine Balding Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Disappearance of Donald Mackay

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Assassination of John Newman

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing

programme.title: Operation Repo: Matt's Back

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Menehune Mischief

programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend the posse heads out to bring a client with a checked past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gangsta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joining the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Run's House: The Secret of My Excess
programme.desc: The boys' wastefulness triggers a cleaning rampage by Rev. Meanwhile, Russy gets obsessive about training for his blue belt in karate.

programme.title: Run's House: Blog Wild
programme.desc: Rev tricks the girls into coming back East for work so that he and Justine can spend time with them. JoJo helps Diggy bring more traffic to his blog.

programme.title: Run's House: Tapper's Delight
programme.desc: Vanessa and Angela nurture Russy's new passion: tap dancing. Diggy plays his sisters into getting him a mini-fridge for his bedroom. Rev tries to babyproof the house.

programme.title: Run's House: An Office He Can't Refuse
programme.desc: Rev tries to become an office worker at the remarkable Global Grind. Diggy's clean freak behavior borders on germaphobia.

programme.title: Run's House: Mother Smother
programme.desc: Diggy and Russy get annoyed by their Mom getting in their business while older siblings Angela and Vanessa don't mind Justine's ways. JoJo helps Rev find a new wardrobe.

programme.title: Run's House: The Puppy Whisperer
programme.desc: Justine and the boys try to train their dog Pal to convince Rev they're worthy of another dog. JoJo cooks healthy fried chicken for his parents.

programme.title: Run's House: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Rev tries to figure out what Run DMC getting inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame is all about. Angela and Vanessa celebrate the 2-year anniversary for Pastry.

programme.title: Run's House: Series Premiere
programme.desc: Daughter Angela is graduating from high school, and Run plans to reward her for being a straight-A student and the family's "role model" by throwing her a party.

programme.title: Run's House: The Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Run invites an emerging hip-hop band, Union Turnpike, to the house to strategize their pitch to Russell Simmons' new music label.

programme.title: Run's House: Chicks Fly the Coop
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Stuck In The Middle Episode
programme.desc: Mona convinces Chase to hire Lorenzo as a pastry chef at City Sonoma. Chase becomes furious with Mona for not informing him that Lorenzo is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Wicked Dog, The Gospel According to Cesar, Cry Baby
programme.desc: Wicked star Eden Espinosa’s Yorkshire Terrier, Owen, is creating drama. The Redemptorist brothers at Holy Redeemer College in Washington, D.C. needed a guard dog. Rocky, a rescue, can’t stop crying.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Battle of Britain
programme.desc: As Cesar's UK holiday comes to a close, he meets a snappy klee kai, a collie mix that's afraid of loud noises and an over-energetic Labrador.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Optimus & Gigi and Sissy
programme.desc: Cesar lends his hand reforming Great Dane Optimus, who has a biting attitude, and Sissy, a fearful Shepherd mix rescued from a terrible hoarding situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.95
programme.desc: An intoxicated teenager confesses to urinating in a friend’s yard; she sues her ex-friend for coming to her workplace and telling everyone about it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.19
programme.desc: Man alleges ex-girlfriend ordered escort attack in bar; she denies and countersues for dirt bike balance, car vandalism, and harassment/Trashed hotel room after 18th birthday sparks damages lawsuit.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.194
programme.desc: Jailed during his birthday after being accused of assault and battery while high on drugs, a young man, who was renting a screened-in porch of a mobile home, sues his landlord.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.51
programme.desc: Young nurse sues ex-boyfriend for damages, Dodge Durango payments, motorcycle damages, and unpaid cell phone charges/Woman sues evicted friend and child for back rent, countersued for belongings left behind.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.131
programme.desc: Man sued by parents after second wife's mysterious death and $40,000 life insurance policy; alleged child abuse involved/Man calls cops to remove ex-girlfriend from apartment, sues her for rent after she leaves, fearing for his life.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.30
programme.desc: Man returns to estranged wife after girlfriend allegedly hires divorce attorney/Man sues cousin for damaging and disposing of property post-eviction from shared home.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.177
programme.desc: Woman's front teeth cracked when intoxicated dancer trips and knocks into her at bar. Dancer denies wrongdoing. 15-year-old accused of breaking pizzeria window denies involvement but refuses to implicate friend. Police provide different account.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.13
programme.desc: A woman claims her ex-boyfriend asked her to pawn her jewelry to pay their bills; he says she offered to do it/A loan to pay DUI bills is disputed by ex-lovers, one of whom claims it was a birthday gift.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.18
programme.desc: Teenagers steal car, vandalize junkyard; one pleads guilty, demands co-conspirator pay $15,000 fine/Woman sues ex for loan balance; he countersues for harassment/Woman seeks compensation for testifying against son's ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.91
programme.desc: Man claims ex-lover forced him to spend on her charge card, even for her own birthday gifts. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for electric bill cost; he argues he covered her rent after she broke the lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.77
programme.desc: A 16-year-old claims a schoolmate keyed her car; the accused classmate denies all charges/A 12-year-old girl, who is entrusted with a valuable Rolex chain, makes the mistake of loaning it to a classmate; he claims he lost it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.14
programme.desc: Teenagers, romantically linked to the same man, bicker over backstabbing, an assault at a party, and car vandalism.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preacher's Passion
programme.desc: A preacher searches for answers about his girlfriend's death.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Walking Free
programme.desc: The story of David Camm, who was convicted in two murder trials -- each eventually overturned -- and was found not guilty in his third trial for the murder of his wife and two children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Burden of Proof
programme.desc: Following the disappearance, in Jan. 1997, of 33-year-old Beverly Watson, her husband, Jim, became a prime suspect. Watson insisted that he was innocent. Police noticed that Jim was wearing makeup to conceal what appeared to be scratches on his face.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction
programme.desc: The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Blue River Murder
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mystery of Slide Mountain
programme.desc: A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In 2010, a historic snowstorm event cripples the Mid-Atlantic region. At the same time, a violent predator takes this opportunity to stalk unsuspecting victims in Virginia.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: Years after Jessica Arredondo's body is found, another young woman is reported missing. Investigators uncover a link between the cases and stop a predator driven to kill.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: Detectives discuss the brutal murder of Mohammed Yousaf. The vulnerable 65-year-old was found dead in his flat in Accrington by his landlord. Yousaf had been stabbed to death by his wife and her lover for the insurance money.

programme.title: Secrets of a Murder Detective
programme.desc: A young father is killed by a gang with various weapons. Detectives discuss how CCTV, phone and intelligence evidence were used to catch the killers.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Clare Mackintosh takes Simon to a quiet community in Northern Ireland to explore a double murder with close parallels to her Sunday Times best-selling novel, `Let Me Lie'.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Tess Gerritsen invites Simon to the state of Oregon in the US, where an incredible real-life case of multi-generational murder influenced her book Body Double.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Bill Cosby

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Boogeyman

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Teenage Terrors
programme.desc: Six days into 2004, an unidentified man is found stabbed to death just outside of the booming oil city of Calgary, Alberta. Just when the police appear to have no leads, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elderly Executioners
programme.desc: Ray and Faye Copeland would become America‚an oldest couple on death row when a simple livestock scam escalated into murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Kid with the Hollywood Haircut
programme.desc: After confessing to the brutal murder of Clarence Pellet in Shelby, Montana, Frank Dryman, a mysterious hitchhiker, is sentenced to hang.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young woman leads police to a man with a criminal history, but with no body, there can be no arrest until they discover a charred tooth.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A wealthy woman died suddenly, but investigators were stumped, with evidence of foul play. Until the ex-wife of the bereaved husband called to make suspicious claims.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A rich elderly woman is murdered, her home ransacked. A trail of blood is left on the stairs. Investigators life prints, but only hunt the killer down 16 years later.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In Miami, a sniper opened fire from the roof of a factory. When police found the gun, the serial number had been scratched off. How did they trace the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a serial killer was terrorising the city of St Louis, the FBI didn't need lab tests, fingerprints of any of the usual methods. All they needed was a computer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Using geographical profiling, investigators close in on a serial rapist, and a cleverly obtained DNA sample confirms their suspicions.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a mother becomes ill while travelling in an airplane, the toxic substance specialist seated next to her suspects her home might be making her and her family sick.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The murder of a respected surgeon in a waterfront apartment community left police in St Petersburg, Florida baffled. Who would have wanted the doctor dead?

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Born to Kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the 1970s, charming New Jersey resident Robert Reldan abducted and brutally murdered two young women, escaping suspicion for a long time.

programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Arthritic golden retriever Brody enjoys some aqua therapy and vestibular problems are throwing shih tzu Max off balance. Plus, at the zoo a young cheetah needs dental treatment.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Burmese cat Cyril has high blood pressure and bleeding in his eyes, and Reilly the chihuahua has a badly broken leg. Plus, a rescue cat needs dental treatment.

programme.title: ER Vets
programme.desc: Veterinarians tends to animals at a 24/7 trauma centre, dealing with life-and-death dilemmas on a daily basis. Despite the high-stress atmosphere, the veterinary pros still find time to offer comfort to or celebrate with the animals' owners.

programme.title: Dr. Lisa to the Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Lisa Chimes is on the search for a canine companion that's right for a teenager who's been wary of dogs her whole life.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.desc: A ten week old golden retriever is rushed to SASH with a swollen face, but her owner has trouble parting with her.

programme.title: OUTmusic

programme.title: OUTshorts

programme.title: OUTmusic Classic
programme.desc: The best classic artists, the most groundbreaking music videos and greatest music, all in the same place.

programme.title: David Tutera: CELEBrations
programme.desc: David throws a birthday party for former WWE Diva Amy Weber's five-year-old twins, but her inappropriate in-laws want an adult shindig.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals continue in Las Vegas where the ninjas face super-sized obstacles in Stages 1 and 2 in timed runs; the ninjas who advance to Stage 2 must complete a six-obstacle course, including new obstacle Hornet's Nest, to advance to Stage 3.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The national finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to stages 3 and 4 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Team Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Teams in the first week of qualifications are led by Joe Moravsky and Jessie Graf.

programme.title: Team Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The NorCal Ninjas, led by team captain David Campbell, take on formidable foes featuring Ian Dory and Meagan Martin.

programme.title: Team Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Brent Steffensen and Kacy Catanzaro lead Team Alpha; Kevin Bull serves as captain of the Expendabulls; other competitors include Ryan Stratis and his team, Stratisfaction, and Tremayne Dortch and the Tre Amigoz.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Angus Sinclair
programme.desc: Angus Sinclair, called Scotland's worst serial killer, is linked to the 1977 murders of two girls in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Moors Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the Moors Murderers, Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, with interviews with the family of Keith Bennett.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Jill Dando
programme.desc: Documentary examining the unsolved murder of British TV presenter and newsreader Jill Dando, who was shot outside her house in Fulham, London, in 1999.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.
