programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Kim Antonakos disappears after a late night out in Manhattan, her father files a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mildred ‘Miss Louise’ Williams disappears from her small Maryland town, local police don’t take the case seriously.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Fatal Extraction
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania factory-town is terrified when Dr. John Yelenic, a much-loved, local dentist is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Femme Fatality
programme.desc: A recent Harvard grad, 23-year-old Laura Houghteling, has just moved home to begin a promising new career as a Washington, D.C. lawyer.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Suddenly Psychic
programme.desc: When a 31-year-old nurse and single mother, Melanie Uribe, is carjacked in an L.A. suburb, police find her burned out truck the same night, but no trace of the victim.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Halloween Homicide
programme.desc: It’s Halloween night 2004, and two popular young women are brutally stabbed to death in their Napa Valley home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Taken By Storm
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the Atlantic off the coast of Maine, a lobster boat fails to return from a day of setting traps. With no Mayday, no word from the crew, the Coast Guard knows it has to act fact.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Amie Hoffman
programme.desc: Teenager Amie Hoffman disappears after work one night. Police are on the case but when a family friend calls psychic Nancy Weber, she sees Amie’s murder in a bizarre vision.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Garden State Asylum
programme.desc: The TAPS team travels to New Jersey to investigate the infamous Essex County Hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Inhuman Entity
programme.desc: The TAPS team answers a call from a family in Blackstone, Massachusetts being plagued by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: I Am Not Guilty
programme.desc: The TAPS team investigates the home of Dr. Samuel Mudd, an alleged conspirator to the assassination of Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Civil War Spirits
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Essex County Penitentiary
programme.desc: The TAPS team is joined by Destination Truthhost Josh Gates as the team returns to Essex County, New Jersey to investigate a notorious penitentiary with a horrifying past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Judgment Day
programme.desc: TAPS calls in Bruce Tango, father of Dave Tango, to help investigate a place close to his heart, the Union County Courthouse, a historic property in Elizabeth, NJ.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House
programme.desc: PRS is called to help a grandmother and her frightened grandson when renovations on her 19th century house stir up the pipe-smoking specter of a former tenant named Alfred.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and the Most Haunted team are invited to the inner sanctum of the Freemasons to investigate the many ghost sightings at Clifton Hall. Even before the investigation starts the team are faced with some of strange phenomena witnessed by others.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Part two of their investigation into Clifton Hall sees the team splitting with going it alone. For one of the team the night becomes terrifying as they find themselves locked in a room with an unseen force.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her team take on their largest investigation to date. They have been invited to investigate a large estate where it seems just about every building has a ghostly tale.
